We can use the f_group_column(started) operation to group the clerks based on their starting year to analyze this situation.

judge_thought: Explanation: The question asks for the year when both the senior and junior officials started their clerk positions simultaneously, but with the condition that one must have started before the other. This creates a contradiction—simultaneous start means they began at the same time, so one cannot have started before the other. Therefore, there is no valid answer that satisfies both conditions. The Prediction Answer correctly reflects this by stating "(no valid answer)."
